_question: Are the obligations of a provider of a general purpose model limited if they only fine-tune it?
_note: 113 articles and 13 annexes scored. Unlike the USC example (2 of 8 non-zero) or CA example (27 of 43 non-zero), the EU AI Act question about GPAI provider obligations touches a very large portion of the document — provider and operator obligations are distributed across the entire regulation.
